title: viola pedatifida var. brittoniana
intro: Viola pedatifida var. brittoniana, also known as Britton's pansy or yellow viola, is a variety of the viola plant species that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola pedatifida var. brittoniana include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Viola pedatifida var. brittoniana can be made by infusing the dried leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves in a tincture or capsule form.
